dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THERE I WAS, SLEEPING IN FRONT OF ME;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BUT THAT WAS ALSO ABSOLUTELY ME!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THESE TONED MUSCLES WERE SO VIVID AND ALIVE;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THERE WAS A FEELING OF HORROR.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: SUDDENLY TWO PEOPLE WAKING UP AS TWO PEOPLE. ONE WHO BECOMES TWO. BECOMING DOPPELGANGER. REAL LIFE DOPPELGANGER. ONE BECAME TWO PEOPLE. OPEN MY EYES AS TWO. EXAMPLE OF DOPPELGANGER. CLONING. OUT OF BODY EXPERIENCE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I KNEW THAT COULD MAKE THINGS MUCH WORSE;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: LET'S NOT TELL HER FOR NOW,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I GUESS THERE'S ONLY ONE PERSON WHO CAN HELP ME SOLVE THIS,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BUT IT WAS EASY TO SEE IT AS JUST A DREAM;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THAT DREAM WAS FREAKY, BUT WONDERFUL.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NOW THAT I ACCEPT IT AS A DREAM, I FEEL SORRY IT WAS JUST A DREAM,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BUT WHAT IF IT WASN'T A DREAM?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE FEELING OF HORROR WAS BACK,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MAYBE BECAUSE I'D DONE IT ONCE, IT WAS EASIER TO DO IT AGAIN;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AT THE EXACT MOMENT I ROUGHLY SHOOK HIM AWAKE,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I WOKE UP AGAIN IN THAT BODY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: PEOPLE SAY HUMANS ARE ADAPTIVE CREATURES,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IT JUST TOOK ME A FEW DAYS TO ACCEPT THIS IMPRACTICAL REALITY,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I HAD NO IDEA WHY THIS BODY WAS CREATED!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IF I FALL ASLEEP, I WAKE UP IN THE OTHER BODY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: WHEN ONE BODY IS AWAKE AND THE OTHER SLEEPS,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AND IF THE AWAKE BODY FALLS ASLEEP,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BECAUSE I WAS SLEEPING, I FEEL REFRESHED!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I WAKE UP IN THE OTHER BODY THAT WAS SLEEPING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I LEARNED FOUR THINGS ABOUT THIS SITUATION OVER THE VACATION!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE SLEEPING ME WON'T WAKE UP BY ITSELF,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I HAVE TO FALL ASLEEP TO CHANGE BODIES.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NO MATTER HOW LONG I WAIT, THAT BODY WON'T WAKE UP,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IF I FORCE MYSELF TO WAKE UP, THE OTHER BODY AUTOMATICALLY FALLS ASLEEP!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE AWAKE BODY PASSES OUT. THAT WAS WHAT HAPPENED.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE SLEEPING BODY FEELS HUNGER AND NEEDS TO GO TO THE BATHROOM TOO, SINCE IT'S AN ALIVE BODY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I SLEPT ALL DAY IN THIS BODY,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I TRIED TO RESIST SLEEPING, BUT EVENTUALLY GOT TIRED AND FELL ASLEEP.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THEN IT BORE HARD ON THE OTHER ME!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I NEED A GOOD SLEEP SCHEDULE FOR MY HEALTH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IT'S TOO HARD TO JUST FALL ASLEEP, SO LET'S USE FORCE!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BUT WHEN I CHANGE TO THE SLEEPING BODY,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MY WELL-RESTED BRAIN FEELS SO REFRESHED.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IF I KILLED ONE BODY, WOULD ONLY ONE BODY REMAIN?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I'M NOT BRAVE ENOUGH TO TRY.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TIME FLEW PAST AND SUDDENLY IT WAS TIME TO GO TO THE NEW SCHOOL;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I GUESS I GOTTA GO TO SCHOOL...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NO ONE WILL UNDERSTAND MY SITUATION.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HE DYED HIS HAIR, LOOKS CUTE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE SECOND SEMESTER IS MY TIME TO SHINE.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THERE ARE A LOT OF HUNKS IN THE PRACTICAL MUSIC DEPARTMENT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE BEAUTY DEPARTMENT IS SUPER CUTE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: HOO HOO, I LOOK DAMN FINE TODAY.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: WITH THIS HIGHER LINE OF SIGHT, THE WORLD LOOKS TINY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY, HEY, DID YOU SEE HIM?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'M GONNA PLAN AHEAD, SO CALL ME.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I CAN'T BELIEVE THE DAY TO WEAR THIS SIZE HAS COME.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I ENDED UP BUYING THE UNIFORM THAT FITS THIS BODY.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: OH WELL, I HOPE NO ONE BULLIES ME.

summary: The main character wakes up to find he has a second, attractive body. He struggles to understand this new reality, experimenting with how the two bodies interact, especially regarding sleep and consciousness, eventually adapting to switching between them and preparing to start a new school year in his new, handsome body, attracting attention.
